violations.text: The ceiling in the (kitchen) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance at inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by various dishes and utensils. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC removed items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Raw animal foods (whole shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (bananas) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC moved during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC placed beverages on rack during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
Food storage containers observed with old labels/stickers preventing the containers from being properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
Leak was observed at the 3-bay sink during inspection. PIC scheduled service during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
Hot hold unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Drain plug was missing on the unit. PIC stated foods will be mostly prepared to order. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024
